race.comment: DAGGERS (1) has started favourite at all five runs since arriving in the Gollan stable but has just one win to show for it. Drew a double-figure gate for the third consecutive time when a game second in a Class 6 over 1350m here three weeks ago. Must again work forward from wide out and is unproven at the mile, but his quality should prevail. NATOYA (14) has been freshened up since a modest effort over 2200m at Warwick Farm on 3 June. Best form comes at today's trip with five top three finishes from six attempts. Poses a threat with a 6 kg pull in the weights. ADDITION (15) won a Class 4 here at this distance two back then caught the eye late at Ipswich most recently. Rarely runs a bad race and makes plenty of each-way appeal. DIANA'S AFFAIR (10) led and held ADDITION out of second spot when they clashed at Ipswich three weeks ago. Can run another cheeky race. FALCON OF MALTA (5) is up in grade but is racing too well to rule out.
